name: Take Charge America
description_short: Take Charge America is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 4.8/5 with 132 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Take Charge America is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. With 132 Google reviews and a 4.8/5.0 rating, Take Charge America has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Take Charge America specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Take Charge America operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering Take Charge America should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

diagnosis: A highly-rated credit repair provider in Phoenix, Arizona with strong customer satisfaction. Best suited for consumers who prefer working with an established, well-reviewed local provider.
